title: Poseidon Principles
summary:
Main
By Nikolaos Tagoulis
Half a decade has passed since the introduction of Poseidon Principles to the ship financing sector, a set of guidelines aimed at advancing the financing of environmentally sustainable ships and reduce carbon emissions of the Shipping Industry. Launched in 2019 with the participation of 11 banks from five countries, this initiative has seen significant growth. Today, 35 banks from 14 countries have signed on, representing nearly 80% of the global ship financing portfolio-approximately $240 billion.
